title: Face Recognition Access Control System with Servo Motor and Pushbullet Integration
description: This project combines face recognition, servo motor control, Pushbullet notifications, and a GUI-based PIN entry system to create an intelligent and secure access control system.

title: DSA Project - Linked List Operations in C
description: A high-performance command-line dashboard that streams and analyzes real-time financial market data using WebSockets and displays automated technical indicators (RSI, MACD) in a customizable dashboard terminal.

title: Assisant-Shaily
description: Shaily is a voice assistant that uses wake word detection, speech recognition, and local LLM (Gemma 3B via Ollama) to give intelligent and personal responses.

title: NeuroClassify Engine
description: This project is a Data Structures and Algorithms (DSA) implementation focused on Linked List operations in C.It was developed as part of my engineering coursework to strengthen understanding of pointers, dynamic memory allocation, and node manipulation.

title: CosmicVoyage 3D
description: An interactive, web-based 3D simulation of our solar system using physics-based orbital trajectories. Leverages three.js for hardware-accelerated graphic rendering and smooth reactive navigation.

title: Antigravity UI Design System
description: A lightweight, fully typed, and highly accessible (WAI-ARIA compliant) headless UI component library built from scratch, designed with deep dark-mode support and custom fluid animation transitions.
